channel.title: Developer Tools on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Developer Tools on simeononsecurity

item.title: ATS Resume Improver: Free, Self-Hostable AI Resume Optimizer That Never Phones Home
item.category: "Career Tools" , "Open Source Projects" , "Artificial Intelligence" , "Privacy Technology" , "Developer Tools" , "Job Hunting" , "Productivity"
item.description: ATS Resume Improver is a free, open-source, client-side resume optimizer supporting OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, and local Ollama models. Parse, score, keyword-match, optimize, and export your resume — all without your data leaving the browser.

item.title: Visual Studio Code vs Visual Studio: Complete 2026 Developer Tool Comparison
item.category: "Development Tools" , "IDE" , "Software Development" , "Programming" , "Code Editors" , "Visual Studio" , "VS Code" , "Microsoft Development" , "Developer Tools" , "Software Engineering"
item.description: Comprehensive 2026 comparison of Visual Studio Code and Visual Studio Community/Professional/Enterprise including features, performance, pricing, and use cases to help developers choose the right IDE.

item.title: Boost PowerShell Performance: use Ngen for Effortless Speed
item.category: "Technology" , "Software Optimization" , "PowerShell Tips" , "Performance Improvement" , "Scripting" , "Native Image Generation" , "Command Line" , "IT Efficiency" , "Developer Tools" , "Coding Techniques"
item.description: Learn how to supercharge PowerShell startup and execution with Ngen, enhancing performance effortlessly.
